testcase.name: testValidSchema
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details.

testcase.name: testMissingFieldBug

failure.message: [[BUG-002] confidence_score should be MISSING from this response (simulated defect – this assertion deliberately captures the bug state)] expected: null but was: 5

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: [[BUG-002] confidence_score should be MISSING from this response (simulated defect – this assertion deliberately captures the bug state)] expected: null but Request method: POST Request URI: http://localhost:8002/api/coach Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "q": "break schema" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Server: Werkzeug/3.1.8 Python/3.9.6 Date: Mon, 13 Apr 2026 18:34:04 GMT Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 308 Connection: close
{ "confidence_score": 5, "key_results": [ "Restate your goal in one concrete sentence.", "Add a timeframe and measurable outcome.", "Identify one skill or habit to develop first." ], "refined_goal": "No specific coaching template matched your input; refine your goal with more detail." }

testcase.name: testHappyPathSales
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: http://localhost:8002/api/coach Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "q": "sales" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Server: Werkzeug/3.1.8 Python/3.9.6 Date: Mon, 13 Apr 2026 18:34:05 GMT Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 311 Connection: close
{ "confidence_score": 8, "key_results": [ "Make 50 cold calls per week.", "Close 5 enterprise deals by the end of Q3.", "Read and implement strategies from 'SPIN Selling'." ], "refined_goal": "Increase quarterly sales conversions by focusing on targeted outreach and pipeline management." }

testcase.name: testHappyPathUpskill
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: http://localhost:8002/api/coach Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "q": "upskill" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Server: Werkzeug/3.1.8 Python/3.9.6 Date: Mon, 13 Apr 2026 18:34:05 GMT Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 319 Connection: close
{ "confidence_score": 9, "key_results": [ "Complete 3 advanced cloud architecture courses.", "Contribute to 2 major open-source projects.", "Lead one internal technical workshop." ], "refined_goal": "Acquire advanced technical skills to transition into a senior engineering role within 6 months." }

Request method: POST Request URI: http://localhost:8002/api/coach Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "q": "too many results" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Server: Werkzeug/3.1.8 Python/3.9.6 Date: Mon, 13 Apr 2026 18:34:05 GMT Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 188 Connection: close

testcase.name: testGibberishInput
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: http://localhost:8002/api/coach Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "q": "asdf" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Server: Werkzeug/3.1.8 Python/3.9.6 Date: Mon, 13 Apr 2026 18:34:05 GMT Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 238 Connection: close
{ "confidence_score": 2, "key_results": [ "Please clarify your original statement.", "Provide specific context on what you want to achieve." ], "refined_goal": "Unable to determine a clear goal from the input provided." }
